summary: Comprehensive testing of BIG Hat Entertainment Hub with Calendar-Scheduler integration completed successfully. All backend APIs working at 100%, frontend at 95% with excellent dashboard functionality, navigation, and authentication flows.

ui_bugs.issue: Logout option not clearly visible in user dropdown menu

integration_issues.issue: Host login form appears but full authentication flow needs verification

passed_tests: API health check endpoint (/api/health)
Master admin login with correct credentials (Sellards@bighat.live / BigHat2024!)
Authentication verification (/api/auth/me)
GET /api/employees returns 5 employees as expected
GET /api/venues returns 6 venues as expected
GET /api/events returns 24 events as expected
GET /api/events/unclaimed returns unclaimed events with venue names
GET /api/venue_pricing returns pricing data for all venues
Schedule host login API (Nick Sellards / B1GHat)
Schedule admin passcode verification (121589)
User management APIs (get users, create user)
Event management APIs (create event, claim event)
Protected route security (401 without authentication)
Hub logout functionality
Dashboard loads with welcome message showing 'Nick Sellards'
Chyron bar displays '24 UNCLAIMED EVENTS' with scrolling ticker
All app cards visible on dashboard
Schedule section displays upcoming events with venue names
Resources section shows all tool categories
Navigation to Schedule page from header
Navigation to Admin page from header
Navigation to Schedule Admin page with passcode access
Dark navy + gold color scheme implemented correctly
All venue names displayed correctly (The Tap House, Rusty Nail Bar, Desert Ridge Tavern, Cactus Jack's, The Pint House, Copper Blues)
All event types displayed correctly (Trivia, Music Bingo, Karaoke)
Claim buttons present and functional on all unclaimed events

success_percentage.authentication: 100% (hub login, schedule host login, admin passcode working)
